# Accessibility Review Checklist

## Structure Review

- Are landmarks and headings meaningful?
- Do controls have accessible names?
- Are instructions and errors tied to the right inputs?

## Interaction Review

- Can the flow be completed with keyboard only?
- Is focus always visible and predictable?
- Do dialogs, menus, and disclosures behave correctly?

## Content Review

- Is meaning conveyed without relying only on color?
- Are link and button labels specific?
- Are loading, error, and success messages perceivable?

## Stress Review

- What happens at 200% zoom or greater?
- What happens with reduced-motion enabled?
- What happens when content length expands?
